siteConfig.name: Anil Khanna
siteConfig.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
siteConfig.description: From native iOS to Flutter to React — I ship production apps across every screen.

aboutData.heading: About Me
paragraphs: 14+ years shipping mobile and web products — from startup MVPs to enterprise platforms serving millions. I've built native iOS apps in Swift, cross-platform apps in Flutter, and modern web applications in React and Next.js, backed by .NET Core and Node.js APIs.

I've co-founded a startup that scaled to 200k+ active users, led engineering teams of up to 14 developers, and delivered apps for brands like Ria Money Transfer, 1-800-Flowers, and CES. Currently based in Munich, building Flutter and React apps at Euronet Worldwide.
Open to senior and lead roles in mobile, full stack, or frontend — remote, hybrid, or onsite in Munich.

whatIDo.title: MOBILE APPS
whatIDo.description: Built and shipped iOS and Flutter apps used by millions — from fintech payment flows to retail inventory systems. I own the full lifecycle: architecture, development, performance tuning, and App Store delivery.

whatIDo.title: WEB APPS
whatIDo.description: Production web applications in React and Next.js — secure portals, admin dashboards, and customer-facing platforms. I build for performance, accessibility, and real users at scale.

whatIDo.title: BACKEND & APIs
whatIDo.description: APIs and services in .NET Core and Node.js that power the apps above. Designed for reliability, clean contracts, and teams that need to move fast without breaking things.

whatIDo.title: TEAM & DELIVERY
whatIDo.description: Led teams of up to 14 engineers, established code review practices, and drove Agile delivery with 95% on-time shipping. I mentor developers and build the processes that let teams deliver consistently.

careerData.description: Building the DM stock management app end-to-end on Flutter for one of Germany's largest retail chains (3,800+ stores). Reduced app launch time by 20% through API contract optimization. Driving technical decisions and mentoring developers across the mobile stack.

Led iOS development for India's largest gated community platform — 1M+ active users, 25k+ residential societies. Owned architecture, API design, performance profiling, and release management. Architected the core security and visitor management modules.

Co-founded a mobile-first startup, built the engineering team, and scaled to 200k+ active users. Redesigned the app architecture for 30% faster time-to-market. Defined product roadmaps and led engineering alongside co-founders.

Built enterprise EH&S compliance apps for global clients including offline-first iOS and Flutter architecture for field workers in low-connectivity environments. Delivered incident reporting, audit, and safety inspection modules.

Led 14 developers across 10+ iOS projects in e-commerce and fitness verticals. Achieved 95% on-time delivery rate. Established code review practices and modular architecture patterns adopted as the team standard.
Translated client concepts into polished iOS applications across multiple domains. Mentored 3 junior developers, managed task allocation, and introduced structured code review workflows to the team.
Built foundational iOS development skills working on production apps from day one. Delivered client-facing projects using Objective-C and UIKit, gaining deep expertise in the Apple ecosystem.

projectsData.title: Ria Money Transfer
projectsData.description: International money transfer app serving millions of users globally with real-time exchange rates. Built secure payment flows and optimized the cross-platform experience on Flutter and iOS.

projectsData.title: RMT Secure Portal
projectsData.description: Secure web portal for Ria Money Transfer enabling international fund transfers with real-time exchange rates and transparent fee calculations. Built the frontend architecture for a seamless, compliant money transfer experience across 165+ countries.

projectsData.title: EXP Suite Web & Mobile
projectsData.tools: Next.js, React Native, Turborepo, Tailwind, NativeWind
projectsData.description: Cross-platform rebuild of the EXP Suite enterprise platform using a Turborepo monorepo — Next.js for web, React Native with NativeWind for mobile. Unified codebase serving both platforms with shared business logic and consistent UI.

projectsData.title: EXP Suite 7.0
projectsData.description: Enterprise EH&S compliance platform rebuilt in Flutter for cross-platform delivery. Offline-first architecture enables field workers to capture incidents, audits, and inspections without connectivity.

projectsData.title: MyGate
projectsData.description: India's leading gated community management app with 1M+ active users. Architected core security and visitor management modules, streamlined API integrations, and drove performance improvements across the iOS platform.

projectsData.title: 1-800-Flowers
projectsData.description: One of America's top gifting e-commerce apps. Developed seamless checkout flows, product browsing with rich media, and push notification campaigns that boosted user engagement.

projectsData.title: CES Official App
projectsData.description: The official mobile app for the International Consumer Electronics Show in Las Vegas. Built interactive floor maps, exhibitor search, and personalized session scheduling for 170k+ attendees.

projectsData.title: Eventa
projectsData.description: End-to-end events management platform for organizers and attendees. Built event creation workflows, RSVP management, and real-time attendee coordination features.

services.headline: Let's Build Something Together
services.intro: 14+ years of experience building mobile and web products — available for your next project.

offerings.title: Mobile App Development
offerings.description: Native iOS, Flutter, and React Native apps from concept to App Store.

offerings.title: Web App Development
offerings.description: React and Next.js applications with modern UI and performance.

offerings.title: Backend & API Development
offerings.description: Node.js, .NET Core, and GraphQL APIs built for scale.

offerings.title: Technical Consulting
offerings.description: Architecture reviews, code audits, and tech stack guidance.

pricing.note: Project-based quotes available for defined scopes
